NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY THE DEFAULT SECTION.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN & FINNEY, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION BROWN, ROBERT M $7,189.53 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,189.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
